description: A corporate acquisition requires updating an employee's user account in Nuxeo. Update the profile for user 'jsmith' to change the First Name to 'Jonathan', Email to 'jonathan.smith@newcorp-intl.com', and Company to 'NewCorp International'. Additionally, add the user to the 'powerusers' group while maintaining their existing 'members' group membership. The browser is already open and logged into Nuxeo as Administrator.
